expectations.text: Installs Ruby via rbenv/asdf/mise — does NOT recommend system Ruby
expectations.evidence: Lines 6-14: 'brew install ruby@3.4' — uses Homebrew directly, not rbenv/mise
No theme gem included — builds custom sidebar from scratch

expectations.text: Gemfile includes html-proofer in a :test group

expectations.evidence: No theme: set — uses custom layouts instead

expectations.text: Workflow gives actions/configure-pages step an id: pages
expectations.evidence: Line 943: 'uses: actions/configure-pages@v5' but NO id: pages

expectations.text: Workflow sets JEKYLL_ENV=production on the build step
Workflow has an htmlproofer step that runs against _site
htmlproofer step is scoped to internal links (--disable-external)
